title: Sports Supporter Portrait AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: interactive football supporter portrait built around adult East Asian creative director with calm confidence and realistic proportions in bright international football fan zone with merch walls, LED banners, flags, and softly blurred supporters. Subject: adult East Asian creative director with calm confidence and realistic proportions appears as the hero supporter with clear expression, polished styling, and body-safe commercial poster presence. Scene: bright international football fan zone with merch walls, LED banners, flags, and softly blurred supporters creates the fan-zone context, with match-day signage, crowd depth, and believable event energy. Composition: Fixed dynamic supporter-poster composition with the subject close to camera, a small football prop as foreground focus, and clear pose readability. Style: Sweet-cool fashion supporter poster with realistic photography texture, commercial campaign polish, clean unbranded football styling, and social-ready impact. Color Palette: Supporter outfit colors from crimson-and-ivory football supporter jacket with embroidered scarf, pleated skirt, enamel pins, and clean unbranded match-day details drive the palette, balanced with clean stadium neutrals and crisp poster contrast. Lighting: Believable polished lighting with controlled highlights, readable shadows, depth, and artifact-free detail. Camera: Clean camera perspective that keeps the main subject readable and preserves the template composition. Typography: Keep any signage or match-day lettering incidental and unbranded; prioritize the supporter portrait and prop clarity. Signature Elements: adult East Asian creative director with calm confidence and realistic proportions, crimson-and-ivory football supporter jacket with embroidered scarf, pleated skirt, enamel pins, and clean unbranded match-day details, holding a small football near the cheek with one hand while the other hand adjusts a team scarf, bright international football fan zone with merch walls, LED banners, flags, and softly blurred supporters, and low ponytail, tiny football hair clips, enamel charm earrings, wrist ribbons, and a compact crossbody pouch form the reusable supporter-poster mechanism. Restrictions: Keep one coherent image, concrete subject detail, readable anatomy or object structure, clean text when present, no placeholder words, no watermark, no extra unrelated elements, and no artifact-heavy output.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Sports Supporter Portrait Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: interactive football supporter portrait built around adult Black fashion stylist with short curls, natural expression, and confident posture in outdoor stadium concourse at dusk with giant screen glow, flags, barriers, and cheering crowd bokeh. Subject: adult Black fashion stylist with short curls, natural expression, and confident posture appears as the hero supporter with clear expression, polished styling, and body-safe commercial poster presence. Scene: outdoor stadium concourse at dusk with giant screen glow, flags, barriers, and cheering crowd bokeh creates the fan-zone context, with match-day signage, crowd depth, and believable event energy. Composition: Fixed dynamic supporter-poster composition with the subject close to camera, a small football prop as foreground focus, and clear pose readability. Style: Sweet-cool fashion supporter poster with realistic photography texture, commercial campaign polish, clean unbranded football styling, and social-ready impact. Color Palette: Supporter outfit colors from emerald-and-white football supporter bomber, high-waisted shorts, striped socks, enamel badges, and unbranded tournament patches drive the palette, balanced with clean stadium neutrals and crisp poster contrast. Lighting: Believable polished lighting with controlled highlights, readable shadows, depth, and artifact-free detail. Camera: Clean camera perspective that keeps the main subject readable and preserves the template composition. Typography: Keep any signage or match-day lettering incidental and unbranded; prioritize the supporter portrait and prop clarity. Signature Elements: adult Black fashion stylist with short curls, natural expression, and confident posture, emerald-and-white football supporter bomber, high-waisted shorts, striped socks, enamel badges, and unbranded tournament patches, raising a small football above the head while leaning forward in a lively fan-poster pose, outdoor stadium concourse at dusk with giant screen glow, flags, barriers, and cheering crowd bokeh, and short curls, metallic football earrings, layered bracelets, face-paint stripe, and tiny trophy keychain form the reusable supporter-poster mechanism. Restrictions: Keep one coherent image, concrete subject detail, readable anatomy or object structure, clean text when present, no placeholder words, no watermark, no extra unrelated elements, and no artifact-heavy output.
